name: Cementos Bio Bio S.A.
summary: Cementos Bio Bio S.A. manufactures and sells cement in Chile and internationally. It provides clinker, pozzolana, gypsum, pozzolanic portland, and other cement; and concrete products for housing, buildings, pavement, infrastructure, and mining projects. The company also provides lime, limestones, agricultural, and road solutions; and logistics management and technical consulting services. The company was founded in 1957 and is based in Providencia, Chile.
